The '''''Inexorable''''' was a [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|''Neutron Star''-class bulk cruiser]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

''Inexorable'' was assigned to [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Winstel Greelanx|Greelanx]] for the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|assault]] on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. ''Inexorable'', along with [[Enforcer (Neutron Star-class)|''Enforcer'']], formed the rear of the assault force's wedge formation.
